footer_desc: More control, more security and better grip in every point.
features_subtitle: High-performance anti-slip spray for a firm, dry, and secure grip.
features_main_text: It is the ultimate ally for players seeking total control over their racket, even in highly demanding conditions. Its advanced formula effectively combats sweat and moisture, creating optimal friction that ensures a firm and stable grip throughout the game.
feature_1_desc: Improves adherence between the hand and the racket, optimizing every movement.
feature_2_desc: Advanced anti-slip: prevents sweat from affecting your performance, ensuring a solid grip even in humid climates.
feature_3_desc: Quick and simple application: just spray and enjoy an instant, long-lasting grip.
feature_4_desc: Formula tested by professionals to withstand the most demanding matches without leaving sticky residue.
feature_5_desc: Forget strong chemical odors. ACE PRO GRIP leaves a fresh, pleasant, and stimulating aroma on your hands so you feel clean and ready for the next point.
feature_6_desc: Its advanced evaporation formula works in less than 5 seconds. Apply the spray, feel the dry effect almost immediately, and get back to the game without losing rhythm.
hiw_step1_desc: Shake the container well before use.
hiw_step3_desc: Allow the product to settle for a few seconds.
faq_q1: How long does the spray effect last?
faq_a1: The effect is designed to last a full padel match (approximately 2 hours). Depending on your sweating level and ambient humidity, you might need a quick touch-up between sets.
faq_q2: Is it safe for skin and the racket?
faq_a2: Absolutely! Our formula is non-toxic, skin-friendly, and specifically designed not to damage your overgrip materials or leave stains.
faq_q3: Does it leave a sticky residue?
faq_a3: No. Unlike traditional resins, ACE PRO GRIP dries in seconds leaving a clean friction layer. Your hands won't feel sticky after the match.
faq_a4: A standard bottle lasts for about 40-50 matches, depending on the amount applied each time. A little goes a long way!
contact_page_subtitle: Do you have questions about ACE PRO GRIP, want to become a distributor, or just want to say hi? Fill out the form and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form_success: Message sent successfully! We will get back to you soon.
form_error: There was an error sending the message. Please try again.
about_phil_text_1: At ACE PRO GRIP we believe that control starts with the grip. Success in sports is defined by the precision of every movement.
about_phil_text_2: We develop solutions designed for athletes seeking safety and confidence even in the most demanding sweat and humidity conditions.
about_quote_sub: ACE represents a way to compete with more safety, concentration, and control.
about_ess_1_text: Perform with the confidence of a professional grip on every point.
about_ess_2_text: Immediate control against the most extreme sweat and humidity.
about_ess_3_text: Instant evaporation formula so you don't waste a second.
about_ess_4_text: Clean and simple application designed for the heat of the game.
about_com_text: At ACE PRO GRIP our commitment is to offer effective solutions that help improve grip, safety, and confidence in every use. We work to create practical, easy-to-apply products oriented towards real performance, designed for athletes and professionals who need to maintain control even in demanding conditions of sweat, humidity, or high intensity. We are committed to quality, applied innovation, and continuous improvement, developing products that provide a simple, useful, and reliable experience. We also believe in responsible, clear, and safe use of our products, which is why we emphasize information, application instructions, and user confidence. Our goal is clear: to help you feel more grip, more stability, and more control when you need it most.
about_com_madein: Product manufactured in Spain by Watermelon Designers, S.L.
dist_intro_1: Bring an innovative, practical, and high-performance sports product to your market. ACE PRO GRIP is an anti-slip spray designed to improve grip, provide more control, and help athletes perform with greater safety even in demanding sweat and humidity conditions.
dist_intro_2: We work with distributors, resellers, sports shops, clubs, gyms, and professionals who want to offer an effective, easy-to-sell solution aimed at an active audience.
dist_intro_3: If you want to add ACE PRO GRIP to your catalog, represent the brand in your area, or open new commercial opportunities in the sports sector, we would be happy to talk to you.
dist_cta_desc: And bring maximum grip to more athletes.
reseller_intro_1: Offer your customers a practical, innovative, and easy-to-sell product. ACE PRO GRIP is a high-performance anti-slip spray designed to improve grip, increase control, and provide more safety against sweat and humidity.
reseller_intro_2: The reseller program is designed for sports shops, clubs, academies, coaches, gyms, and specialized businesses that want to resell ACE PRO GRIP directly to their customers.
reseller_intro_3: If you have a sports community, a retail store, or an online channel, you can add ACE PRO GRIP to your catalog and offer a useful solution for athletes seeking more confidence in every movement.
reseller_cta_desc: With a product designed for those who want to feel more grip and take control.
reseller_cta_button: I want to be a reseller
form_privacy: I have read and accept the
privacy_p_1: The data controller for the information collected through this website is Watermelon Designers, S.L. (owner of the ACE PRO GRIP brand), located in Barcelona, Spain. You can contact us directly via email at: contacto@aceprogrip.com.
privacy_h2_2: 2. Purpose of collected data and consent
privacy_p_2_1: The personal data provided through our contact form (name, email, phone, company, city, country) will be used exclusively for the following purposes:
privacy_li_2_1: To respond to inquiries, doubts, or requests for information raised by the user.
privacy_li_2_2: To manage requests for distribution, sales (resellers), or commercial agreements.
privacy_li_2_3: To improve customer service and our business relationship.
privacy_p_2_2: By checking the acceptance box on the contact form, the user grants their express, free, and unequivocal consent for the processing of their data for the described purposes.
privacy_p_3: The legal basis for processing your data is the consent you grant us by checking the corresponding box and submitting the contact form.
privacy_p_4: The personal data provided will be kept for the time strictly necessary to fulfill the purpose for which they were collected and to determine any possible liabilities that could arise from said purpose, or until the user requests their deletion.
privacy_p_5: Your data will not be transferred, sold, or communicated to third parties, except by legal obligation. However, to manage emails, we use third-party tools (such as EmailJS) that act as data processors and comply with current security and privacy regulations.
privacy_p_6_1: Anyone has the right to obtain confirmation about whether ACE PRO GRIP is processing personal data concerning them. You can exercise the following rights:
privacy_li_6_1: Right of access: to know what data we have about you.
privacy_li_6_2: Right of rectification: to correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
privacy_li_6_3: Right of erasure (the right to be forgotten): to request that we delete your data.
privacy_li_6_4: Right of opposition and limitation: to object to us processing your data for specific purposes.
privacy_p_6_2: To exercise these rights, you just have to send us an email to contacto@aceprogrip.com indicating the right you wish to exercise and attaching a copy of your ID or equivalent document to verify your identity.
privacy_p_7: ACE PRO GRIP reserves the right to modify this policy to adapt it to new legislation or jurisprudence. In such cases, we will announce the changes introduced on this page reasonably in advance of their implementation.
